questionHtml: With reference to the diagram, explain how water in sweat evaporates.
markschemeHtml:
1. heat increases molecular motion/vibration;
  2. (hydrogen) bonds break/bonds between water molecules break;
  3. water evaporation is separation of water molecules/water changes from liquid to gas/vapour;
  4. heat removed from skin surface/body;

meta.title: With reference to the diagram, explain how water in sweat evaporates.
